text: In the first scene, I am peering into a glass-walled room, observing people deeply engaged in learning or discussion. The space buzzes with intellectual curiosity and focused energy. I feel a quiet sense of anticipation and possibility—what new ideas might emerge here? In the next scene, I find myself before a vibrant display of R+D—research and development. The colors and screens suggest creativity and innovation. Surrounded by expressions of human ingenuity, I feel inspired and reflective, contemplating the ceaseless drive to understand and shape our world. I feel small in the stream of collective progress, but also grateful to witness it.
